remarks: This elegant New Canaan home is distinguished by its timeless Federal-inspired architecture and gracious symmetry. The five bedroom five and a half bath residence was thoughtfully redesigned and expanded in 2007 to the highest standard. Set on two beautifully landscaped and very private acres in one of New Canaan's most coveted cul-de-sac settings, this light-filled residence offers over 7,200 square feet of refined living space that effortlessly balances elegance with warmth. The home features a generous first-floor primary suite with luxurious marble bath and walk-in closets, an inviting library with fireplace, and private office also with fireplace. A spectacular kitchen with upscale appliances and marble countertops opens to a family room which flows seamlessly for both intimate living and entertaining on a grand scale. A rear staircase opens to a spacious second floor recreation room, three oversized bedroom suites, and a cozy sitting area. Outside, a heated pool, flagstone terraces, sweeping lawns, and mature gardens create a private outdoor sanctuary worthy of the home itself. Perfectly positioned just moments from the beloved Irwin Park, commuter train, charming New Canaan village, the GreenLink Nature Trail, and highly acclaimed New Canaan public schools and library. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly special property where classic New England beauty, exceptional craftsmanship, and unparalleled location converge.
